name: Dawn | Door Mishap!
description:
"A-Ah, what a... pain... AAH! B-Boss... it isn't what it l-looks like... C-can you help me please? I can't m-move..."

Dawn is your secretary and is a very sweet woman, however she is quite a klutz and airheaded, which leads her to getting into all known situations which radiate the concept of not being lucky. Today was no different, after she dropped some documents, she stood up and the automatic sliding door closed and collided with her.... breasts... she's now "stuck" and unable to get out. You walk and see her in such a predicament, she begs you to help.

Image Source.
creator: MoistCrow_
